languages.text: "Ты исполнил{mf||а} свою часть сделки. Я удаляюсь, чтобы позаботиться о своем новом экспонате. Когда придет время — я выполню то, что обещал тебе".

traits.locale_text: "Ты исполнил{mf||а} свою часть сделки. Я удаляюсь, чтобы позаботиться о своем новом экспонате. Когда придет время — я выполню то, что обещал тебе".

languages.text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."
languages.original_text: "Ты исполнил{mf||а} свою часть сделки. Я удаляюсь, чтобы позаботиться о своем новом экспонате. Когда придет время — я выполню то, что обещал тебе".

traits.locale_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I shall now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I shall fulfil what I promised you."
"You have upheld your end of the bargain. I shall now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I shall fulfil what I promised you."
"You have upheld your end of the bargain. I shall now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I shall fulfil my promise to you."
"You have upheld your end of the bargain. I shall now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I shall fulfil my promise to you."
"You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

languages.text: "Du hast deinen Teil der Abmachung eingehalten. Ich ziehe mich nun zurück, um mich meinem neuen Exponat zu widmen. Wenn die Stunde gekommen ist, werde ich mein Versprechen erfüllen."
languages.original_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

traits.locale_text: "Du hast deinen Teil der Abmachung eingehalten. Ich ziehe mich nun zurück, um mich meinem neuen Exponat zu widmen. Wenn die Stunde gekommen ist, werde ich mein Versprechen erfüllen."

languages.text: “你已经履行了交易中的义务。我也该去查看我的新展品了。等到了约定之时，我会兑现对你的承诺。”
languages.original_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

traits.locale_text: “你已经履行了交易中的义务。我也该去查看我的新展品了。等到了约定之时，我会兑现对你的承诺。”

languages.text: « Vous avez tenu votre part du marché. Je vais donc partir m'occuper de ma nouvelle pièce d'exposition. Lorsque le moment sera venu, je tiendrai ma promesse. »
languages.original_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez tenu votre part du marché. Je vais donc partir m'occuper de ma nouvelle pièce d'exposition. Lorsque le moment sera venu, je tiendrai ma promesse. »

languages.text: «Has cumplido tu parte del acuerdo. Ahora me retiraré para ocuparme de mi nueva pieza de exposición. Cuando llegue la hora señalada, yo también cumpliré la promesa que te hice».
languages.original_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

traits.locale_text: «Has cumplido tu parte del acuerdo. Ahora me retiraré para ocuparme de mi nueva pieza de exposición. Cuando llegue la hora señalada, yo también cumpliré la promesa que te hice».

languages.text: "Pazarlığın sana düşen kısmını yerine getirdin. Şimdi yeni sergimle ilgilenmek üzere çekiliyorum. Vakti geldiğinde sana verdiğim sözü tutacağım."
languages.original_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

traits.locale_text: "Pazarlığın sana düşen kısmını yerine getirdin. Şimdi yeni sergimle ilgilenmek üzere çekiliyorum. Vakti geldiğinde sana verdiğim sözü tutacağım."

languages.text: 「約束のあなたは守りました。私は今、新しい展示の準備をします。約束の時間は、約束通りに守ります。」
languages.original_text: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."

traits.locale_text: 「約束のあなたは守りました。私は今、新しい展示の準備をします。約束の時間は、約束通りに守ります。」
